title: Shinjis scream in 12 different dubs
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's scream in 12 different dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Tue Nov 17, 2020 10:48 pm I've made a comparison video of Shinji's scream in End of Evangelion, across 12 different dubs. I included every dub I could find here; I hope you enjoy! I find it interesting to see how different voice actors handled the scene. https://drive.google.com/file/d/1o6-5eg ... sp=sharing Note that I didn't include several dubs, some of which reused the Japanese scream, some of which reused the ADV English dub scream, and a few that didn't dub End of Evangelion at all. I also couldn't find the original pre-Netflix French dub, among others, so let me know if you happen to know where I can get my hands on that version of the scene. (As a sidenote: should these dub comparison videos go in this board or the "Everything Else Evangelion" one? I'm really not sure.)

[]: Re: Shinji's scream in 12 different dubs             Quote Post by Berserker » Tue Nov 17, 2020 11:03 pm Only Ogata and Spencer's version seems natural, something a devastated teenager would do if he got in such a place and moment. Somehow, the Latin American version made me totally . And yes, this belongs in everything else evangelion.

[]: Re: Shinji's scream in 12 different dubs             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Nov 18, 2020 12:46 am I like your compilations, but are you sure you don't want to post these on YouTube so it can get more easily discovered? Are you worried about copyright strikes?

[]: Re: Shinji's scream in 12 different dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Wed Nov 18, 2020 6:51 am Yeah, it's a combination of me being worried about copyright strikes, and the fact that a close friend of mine who's subscribed to both my YouTube channels gets anxiety related to the show. I might try posting them on YouTube at some point in the future, but as it stands I think I'm content with keeping them here.

[]: Re: Shinji's scream in 12 different dubs             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Nov 18, 2020 3:46 pm Ogata and English Netflix is the best, embarrassed for the German edition, totally fucked up the particular audio mixing.

[]: Re: Shinji's scream in 12 different dubs             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Nov 19, 2020 7:36 am Yeah, the German dub is..... not great in general, and this scene is definitely indicative of that xD
